allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse "c:\\Users\\willi\\Downloads\\Showdown" | Where-Object { !$_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName, Length | Sort-Object FullName)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\WCGaspar\\Downloads\\Showdown\\assets" -Recurse | Where-Object {$_.PSIsContainer -eq $false} | Group-Object Directory | ForEach-Object { @{ Directory = $_.Name; FileCount = $_.Count } } | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\willi\\Downloads\\Showdown" -Force | Select-Object Name, @{Name='Type'; Expression={if \($_.PSIsContainer\) {'Directory'} else {'File'}}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\willi\\Downloads\\Showdown" -Force -Depth 1 | Where-Object { $_.Name -notmatch "node_modules|__pycache__|\\.git" } | Select-Object Name, @{Name='Type'; Expression={if \($_.PSIsContainer\) {'Dir'} else {'File'}}} | Format-Table)

PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\git.exe" -C "c:\\Users\\willi\\Downloads\\Showdown" tag -l; Write-Host "---DIST---"; Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\willi\\Downloads\\Showdown\\dist" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, @{N="MB";E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}})
